title: Match dedup keys on (competition, season, home-key, away-key) without date
evidence: src/brsoccer/data.clj:160-176 dedup-matches — deliberately excludes date; could collapse two genuinely distinct same-season fixtures with the same ordered pairing across overlapping sources
suggestion: Documented tradeoff; acceptable for the provided data. Consider including round/stage in the key if exactness across cup rounds matters.

title: Exposes 10 MCP tools and returns structuredContent alongside formatted text
evidence: src/brsoccer/mcp.clj:34-174 — adds best_record, list_competitions, brazilian_players_by_club beyond the required capabilities; each result carries :structuredContent for model reasoning
suggestion: None — beyond-spec capability, not a deduction.

title: Tests combine a hand-verified synthetic graph with real-dataset coverage
evidence: test/brsoccer/query_test.clj:134-144 reproduces the 2019 Brasileirão table (Flamengo, 90 pts, 28W); 26 deftests across query/mcp/normalize
